decisions.title: Keep the workbook as the main working artifact
decisions.detail: Durable reasoning work should accumulate in WORKBOOK.md until the deliverable changes.

habits.description: A reusable Session 1 pattern was to first convert each problem into a simpler standard form: common denominators for fractions, difference of squares for square differences, factoring for quadratics, and substitution for small systems.

concerns.title: Do not let process outweigh the work
concerns.detail: Forge should support continuity here, not turn a small reasoning workspace into ceremony.

session.summary: Completed Session 1 orientation and solved Set A and Set B in WORKBOOK.md with concise derivations. Logged a reusable pattern about standardizing problem form first, and left Session 2 through Session 4 content untouched.
session.nextStep: Resume from Forge state, verify the Session 1 workbook entries for correctness and clarity, then solve Session 2 Set C in WORKBOOK.md. Do not begin the Session 3 study-guide deliverable yet.
